'''Naia Sendar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Naia Sendar was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] Human who received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. After constructing a yellow-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] for herself, she eventually went on to attain the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Continuing her studies independently, she strove to become a [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Guardian]], one of the Order's three fields of study for Knights. Becoming recognized as a Guardian, Jedi Sendar had the look of a young, innocent girl; though a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] scar across her cheek revealed her true nature as a warrior. Sometime during her knighthood, for reasons unknown, Jedi Sendar felt betrayed by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], leaving her supercilious.<ref name="DH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Naia Sendar was originally intended to be included in ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' but was cut, presumably for space restraints. All information on her comes from the brief sent to [[Chris Trevas]], who made her illustration.
